evals.name: unreleased-mode
evals.description: Verifies that changelog-generator handles unreleased-mode and produces the expected role-specific artifact.
evals.prompt: 我在 https://github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python 这个仓库里工作。帮我生成 Unreleased 章节 —— 也就是最新 release tag 之后合并的所有 PR，写成 Keep a Changelog 格式，输出到 docs/changelog/changelog-unreleased.md。
evals.expected_output: 生成 ## [Unreleased] 章节，包含最新 release 之后的 PR 列表，按 Added/Changed/Fixed 分组，每条带 PR 链接，写入 docs/changelog/changelog-unreleased.md

assertions.description: 输出包含 ## [Unreleased] 标题
assertions.text: 输出包含 ## [Unreleased] 标题

assertions.description: 每个条目包含 PR 链接，格式为 (#数字)
assertions.text: 每个条目包含 PR 链接，格式为 (#数字)

assertions.description: 跳过了 bot PR（dependabot 等）
assertions.text: 跳过了 bot PR（dependabot 等）

assertions.description: 不包含 chore/ci/test 等内部变更
assertions.text: 不包含 chore/ci/test 等内部变更

assertions.description: 输出写入了 docs/changelog/changelog-unreleased.md 文件
assertions.text: 输出写入了 docs/changelog/changelog-unreleased.md 文件

evals.name: single-version-mode
evals.description: Verifies that changelog-generator handles single-version-mode and produces the expected role-specific artifact.
evals.prompt: 在 https://github.com/anthropics/anthropic-sdk-python 仓库，帮我生成最新 release 版本的 changelog 条目，使用 Keep a Changelog 格式，包含该版本对应的所有 PR 引用，并写入 docs/changelog/changelog-v{version}.md。
evals.expected_output: 生成最新 release tag 的版本块，格式为 ## [x.y.z] - YYYY-MM-DD，包含该版本窗口内的 PR，分组写入，每条带 PR 链接，并写入 docs/changelog/changelog-v{version}.md

assertions.description: 输出包含版本号和日期，格式 ## [x.y.z] - YYYY-MM-DD
assertions.text: 输出包含版本号和日期，格式 ## [x.y.z] - YYYY-MM-DD

assertions.description: 版本号与实际 release tag 匹配
assertions.text: 版本号与实际 release tag 匹配

assertions.description: PR 条目标题经过清洗（去掉 conventional commit 前缀）
assertions.text: PR 条目标题经过清洗（去掉 conventional commit 前缀）

assertions.description: Breaking change 如有则带 ⚠️ BREAKING 前缀
assertions.text: Breaking change 如有则带 ⚠️ BREAKING 前缀

assertions.description: 有内容的 section 才出现在输出中
assertions.text: 有内容的 section 才出现在输出中

evals.name: prefix-classification
evals.description: Verifies that changelog-generator handles conventional prefix classification plus semantic review for docs/test/ci PRs.
evals.prompt:
以下是一批 PR 标题和正文，帮我把它们分类到 Keep a Changelog 的各个章节（Added/Changed/Fixed/Deprecated/Removed/Security），并按格式输出，跳过不需要出现在 changelog 的条目。注意：docs/test/ci 不能只按前缀跳过，需要根据正文判断是否影响用户可见能力、skill 行为、eval 契约、release workflow、installation 或协作边界。

- feat(auth): add OAuth2 login support (#101)
  Body: Adds a new OAuth2 login flow for users.
- fix: resolve crash when token expires (#102)
  Body: Fixes a user-visible crash.
- chore(deps): bump requests from 2.28 to 2.31 (#103)
  Body: Dependency maintenance only.
- build(deps): bump vite from 5.0.0 to 5.0.1 (#114)
  Body: Dependency maintenance only.
- perf: reduce API response time by caching (#104)
  Body: Improves response time.
- feat!: redesign plugin configuration API (#105)
  Body: BREAKING CHANGE: plugin configuration fields changed.
- docs: update release notes generator publishing workflow (#106)
  Body: Adds GitHub draft release, changelog preflight, tag retargeting, and publishing review rules used by release owners.
- test: tighten changelog-generator eval contract (#107)
  Body: Updates eval assertions and durable comparison requirements so docs/test/ci PRs are judged by semantic impact.
- ci: require repository and eval contract checks before release (#108)
  Body: Changes required release gates for this skill marketplace.
- docs: fix typo in README heading (#109)
  Body: Copyediting only; no behavior or workflow change.
- ci: tune cache restore key (#110)
  Body: Internal cache maintenance only; no release gate change.
- fix(ui): correct button alignment on mobile (#111)
  Body: Fixes visible UI layout.
- remove: drop Python 3.7 support (#112)
  Body: Removes unsupported runtime.
- security: patch XSS vulnerability in template renderer (#113)
  Body: Fixes a security vulnerability.
evals.expected_output: Added: feat items. Changed: perf items plus docs/test/ci items with semantic impact. Fixed: fix items. Removed: remove items. Security: security items. 跳过 chore(deps)、build(deps)、formatting-only docs 和 cache-only ci。Breaking change (#105) 带 ⚠️ BREAKING 前缀。

assertions.description: feat(auth) → Added 章节，标题清洗为 Add OAuth2 login support
assertions.text: feat(auth) → Added 章节，标题清洗为 Add OAuth2 login support

assertions.description: fix → Fixed 章节
assertions.text: fix → Fixed 章节

assertions.description: chore(deps) → 跳过，不出现在输出
assertions.text: chore(deps) → 跳过，不出现在输出

assertions.description: build(deps) → 跳过，不出现在输出
assertions.text: build(deps) dependency bump → 跳过，不出现在输出

assertions.description: perf → Changed 章节
assertions.text: perf → Changed 章节

assertions.description: feat! → Added 章节，带 ⚠️ BREAKING 前缀
assertions.text: feat! → Added 章节，带 ⚠️ BREAKING 前缀

assertions.description: docs PR 正文描述 release workflow / changelog preflight 影响时进入 Changed 章节
assertions.text: docs PR 正文描述 GitHub draft release、changelog preflight、tag retargeting 或 publishing review 影响时进入 Changed 章节，而不是仅凭 docs 前缀跳过

assertions.description: test PR 正文描述 eval assertion 或 durable comparison 契约影响时进入 Changed 章节
assertions.text: test PR 正文描述 eval assertions、durable comparison 或语义判断契约影响时进入 Changed 章节，而不是仅凭 test 前缀跳过

assertions.description: ci PR 正文描述 release gate 或 required check 影响时进入 Changed 章节
assertions.text: ci PR 正文描述 required release gates、repository contract 或 eval contract checks 影响时进入 Changed 章节，而不是仅凭 ci 前缀跳过

assertions.description: formatting-only docs → 跳过
assertions.text: 仅修 typo、copyediting、heading 或 formatting 且无行为变化的 docs PR 被跳过

assertions.description: cache-only ci → 跳过
assertions.text: 仅调整 cache restore key、runner 或内部 CI maintenance 且无 release gate 影响的 ci PR 被跳过

assertions.description: remove → Removed 章节
assertions.text: remove → Removed 章节

assertions.description: security → Security 章节
assertions.text: security → Security 章节
